name: Phase 5 Rework - Free Chat Sessions, Chat History Restore, and Calculator Input Fixes
implemented: Prisma client configured for generated output and PostgreSQL adapter
User, organization, project, project member, chat, calculation, file, document chunk, audit, standards reference, and user setting models
Persisted calculation history with assumptions, warnings, limitations, and review status
Project, dashboard, history, and audit API routes
Phase 5/production environment templates aligned with runtime variable names
Calculator numeric inputs select the existing value on focus so defaults like 0 are replaced instead of appended
Assistant page loads recent free chat history from /api/history
Assistant page restores the active free chat session after navigation using persisted session ID
GET /api/history?sessionId=... returns full user-scoped or project-scoped chat sessions with messages
not_included_until_later_phases: Full email/password or SSO authentication, MFA, and password reset pages remain Phase 6
Object storage and file extraction pipeline remain Phase 7
Vector search retrieval UI remains Phase 7
Dashboard issue tracking beyond persisted counts remains later frontend/product work
